title: A Sister's All You Need
description:
Itsuki Hashima is a young novelist who is completely obsessed with little sister characters and spends most of his time trying to create the perfect story around them. Despite his strange personality and eccentric imagination, he is surrounded by a group of supportive friends, fellow writers, and artists who constantly bring chaos, humor, and unexpected moments into his everyday life. Between struggling with deadlines, dealing with creative pressure, and navigating awkward social situations, Itsuki slowly begins to understand both himself and the people closest to him.

Although his life often appears ridiculous and filled with comedic misunderstandings, the series also explores the personal insecurities, ambitions, and emotional struggles of young adults working in the creative industry. As friendships deepen and romantic feelings slowly begin to develop among the group, Itsuki and his companions discover the importance of companionship, passion, and finding inspiration through the people around them.
